parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "brand_id":             "{{ $json.brand_id }}",
  "external_id":          "{{ $json.external_id }}",
  "token":                {{ $json.token ? JSON.stringify($json.token) : 'null' }},
  "email":                {{ $json.email ? JSON.stringify($json.email) : 'null' }},
  "customer_external_id": {{ $json.customer_external_id ? JSON.stringify($json.customer_external_id) : 'null' }},
  "total_price":          {{ $json.total_price }},
  "line_items":           {{ JSON.stringify($json.line_items) }},
  "checkout_url":         {{ $json.checkout_url ? JSON.stringify($json.checkout_url) : 'null' }},
  "external_created_at":  {{ $json.external_created_at ? JSON.stringify($json.external_created_at) : 'null' }},
  "external_updated_at":  {{ $json.external_updated_at ? JSON.stringify($json.external_updated_at) : 'null' }}
}
